auth.newHere: New here? See how RuralPay works →
auth.businessInformationSubtitle: Tell us about your business to start accepting payments
auth.notAMerchant: I'm not a merchant — skip this step
auth.verifyPhoneSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent via SMS, WhatsApp, and Email
auth.stepPersonalHint: We need your details to create your account. This takes about 2 minutes.
auth.stepMerchantHint: This lets us set up your payment terminal so customers can pay you.
auth.stepPhoneHint: We're confirming this number belongs to you — it protects your account.
auth.stepRoadmapSubtitle: 4 quick steps — takes about 3 minutes total
auth.stepRoadmapSubtitleMerchant: 5 quick steps — takes about 4 minutes total
auth.bvnHelp: Your BVN is an 11-digit number linked to all your bank accounts. Dial *565*0# on any network to get it free.
auth.livenessSubtitle: We need to confirm it's really you
auth.livenessWhyHint: This confirms you are a real person and matches your face to your BVN record. It takes about 10 seconds.
auth.livenessStep2: Slowly turn your head when prompted
auth.livenessStep3: Your face is matched to your BVN — done
auth.livenessPrivacyNote: Your face scan is processed securely and never stored on this device.
auth.merchantRegistrationSuccess: Merchant Registration Successful. Profile Would Be Validated In 3-5 Business Days
auth.resendFailed: Failed to resend code. Please try again.

bankTransfer.title: Bank Transfers
bankTransfer.accountVerifyFailed: Please Verify the Account Details. Name Enquiry Failed.
bankTransfer.accountVerifyFailedTransfer: Account Verification Failed. Cannot Proceed With Transfer.

onboarding.slide1Subtitle: See your balance and recent payments the moment you open the app.
onboarding.slide2Subtitle: Type an account number — we find the name automatically. No mistakes, no stress.
onboarding.slide3Subtitle: See a QR code at a shop? Just open the app, point, and pay. Done.
onboarding.slide4Subtitle: Every payment needs your PIN or fingerprint. Nobody else can spend your money.

linkBankAccount.verificationSubtitle: To link your bank account securely, we need to verify your account ownership.
linkBankAccount.step2: This confirms you own the account
linkBankAccount.step3: Your Account Will be Linked Instantly
